title: Dependency Observation (v0.4)
description: Raw extracted dependencies before TSM ordering. Path B input. Produced by AI agents, extraction scripts, or human field-mapping. See ARCHITECTURE.md v0.3.

shortLabel.description: Optional terse display label propagated to the derived task. When absent, the synthesis layer may derive one from entityType.

category.description: Optional free-form category for grouping in a category-grouped legend. Round-trips through derive() onto task.category in the derived scene. Authors pick a domain-appropriate vocabulary (e.g. cli/runtime/sdk/tools/mcp/coder).

entityType.description: Caller's typology. The engine does not interpret it; the synthesis layer may use it to derive presentation hints like shortLabel.

relation.description: calls | invokes | depends-on | references | imports | configures — caller's choice; not interpreted by the algorithm.

architectureType.description: Optional per-matrix architecture hint. Derive may use it to bias which architecture plugin applies within this matrix. If omitted, derive's existing classifyArchitecture(partition) logic decides per-matrix. Mirrors the 9-value enum in schemas/tsm-scene.schema.json matrices[].architectureType and the registered plugins in core/concept/index.js.

kind.description: Semantic kind for the cross-matrix arrow. 'transaction' for inter-firm contracts (e.g. Fig 18.1 goods/payment); 'forward' / 'backward' for directional handoffs. Matches tsm-scene.schema.json $defs.crossMatrixArrow.kind. Optional; derive defaults to 'transaction' when label is present and no kind is declared.
